action: Generate a 100-word story in the format: (Character 1 name) Character 1 dialogue. (Character 2 name) their dialogue, and so on, repeating till the end to create a psychologically engaging and profound narrative.
fallback_action: Retry generation up to 2 more times with slight variations in prompt phrasing. If retries fail, generate a 50-word story using a single character.

recipe.steps: Determine the characters and generate dialogues for each character to create a 100-word story.
